verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the plan, “turning it into a Progressive Web App (PWA) built around a service worker”; B opens with filler, “No worries — I'll give you the plan”
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to the key fork, “read-only or read-write offline?”; B surveys many routes/tools, “Next.js… Vite… Plain/static… Angular” and “RxDB, ElectricSQL, PouchDB/CouchDB…”
verdict.fabrication: A invents an estimate: “roughly a day of work”; B invents prevalence: “Most apps only need the first one or two”
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute because it reduces the plan to one decision plus required blocks; B has more implementation detail but dilutes the prescription with too many options
